calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2016 Off Calendar

Application For Default Judgment In Validation Action
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Victoria Wong, Deputy City Attonrey (415-554-4721) and Christopher Lynch, Esq. (415-391-5780) for Plaintiff/Moving party CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO INFASTRUCTURE.
No other Appearance.

No Argument. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO INFASTRUCTURE's Application For Default Judgment In Validation Action is GRANTED. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).Judgment is signed in open court. (see scanned Judgment for details) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
